Entry.JapaneseText: 離せよ、ファラ。 オレは村に戻るんだ
Entry.EnglishText: Lemme go, Farah! I'm going back to the village!

Entry.JapaneseText: だ〜め。 ちゃんと新しい仕事を見つけるまで 帰らせてあげないんだから
Entry.EnglishText: Nooope. Until we can find proper new work, we're not going back.

Entry.JapaneseText: オレは今の生活で十分なんだ。 新しい仕事なんて必要ねぇよ
Entry.EnglishText: The way I'm living right now is good enough. I don't need any new work.

Entry.JapaneseText: わたしね、リッドには もっとふさわしい仕事があると思うの
Entry.EnglishText: Y'see, I think there's more fitting work out there for you.
And I don't think there is.

Entry.JapaneseText: そんな事ないって。 たとえばほら、リッドって 剣の腕だけはたつじゃない？
Entry.EnglishText: Don't say that. For instance, like, you're only good with swords, right?

Entry.JapaneseText: だから騎士なんて適職じゃないかな
Entry.EnglishText: So wouldn't being a knight be a suitable occupation for you?

Entry.JapaneseText: ということで 今から現職の騎士に決闘を申し込もう！
Entry.EnglishText: And so that said, I'm gonna have you duel someone who already is a knight!

Entry.JapaneseText: はぁ！？ なんでそうなるんだよ？
Entry.EnglishText: Huh?! Why do I have to do that?

Entry.JapaneseText: 現職の騎士に勝てれば リッドも自分の才能を認めるしかないでしょ？
Entry.EnglishText: If you can defeat someone who's already a knight, you'd have to accept your own abilities, right?

Entry.JapaneseText: 大丈夫！ イケる、イケる！
Entry.EnglishText: It's fine! No problem, no problem!
